name: Import-LocalizedData

options.name: -BaseDirectory
options.description: Specifies the base directory where the `.psd1` files are located. The default is the directory where the script is located. `Import-LocalizedData` searches for the `.psd1` file for the script in a language-specific subdirectory of the base directory.

name: -BindingVariable
-Variable
options.description: Specifies the variable into which the text strings are imported. Enter a variable name without a dollar sign (`$`).

options.name: -FileName
options.description: Specifies the name of the data file (`.psd1)` to be imported. Enter a filename. You can specify a filename that doesn't include its `.psd1` filename extension, or you can specify the filename including the `.psd1` filename extension. Data files should be saved as Unicode or UTF-8.

options.name: -SupportedCommand
options.description: Specifies cmdlets and functions that generate only data.

options.name: -UICulture
options.description: Specifies an alternate UI culture. The default is the value of the `$PsUICulture` automatic variable. Enter a UI culture in `<language>-<region>` format, such as `en-US`, `de-DE`, or `ar-SA`.

description: Imports language-specific data into scripts and functions based on the UI culture that's selected for the operating system.
